---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for Termote
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. Ex. I'm frustrated when using Termote on mobile because [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Component area**

- [ ] PWA/Frontend
- [ ] Mobile experience
- [ ] Gestures/Touch
- [ ] Keyboard/Input
- [ ] Session management
- [ ] Terminal (ttyd/tmux)
- [ ] tmux-api
- [ ] Deployment/Infrastructure
- [ ] Security/Authentication
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

**Use case**
Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
